name: CannotPerformOperationDrawingEditorMustBeClosedException
summary: The CannotPerformOperationDrawingEditorMustBeClosedException class defines the exception that is thrown when a user tries to do an operation which requires the drawing editor to be closed.

constructors.name: CannotPerformOperationDrawingEditorMustBeClosedException
constructors.summary: Creates a new cannot perform operation drawing editor must be closed exception instance.
